summary: Calculate when the first Inspection of an Inspection Schedule will be created
description: Calculates the creation date for the first Inspection to be created based on an Inspection Schedule's temporal attributes.

first_inspection_created_at.description: Timestamp of when the first inspection will be created from the schedule.

ends_at.description: Schedule end date. When frequency is 'once' this should be the same value as starts_at.

days_created_before_due_date.description: Number of days before the inspection due date that the inspection should be created
